segments.text: It's not like he's dominating the neutral or anything
segments.original_text: 決してね、立ち回りで壊してるってわけじゃないんですけど

segments.text: Just grinding out the interactions one by one
segments.original_text: 地道にコツコツとした差し合いを一つ一つ勝ってって

full_text: Still hanging in there... It's not like he's dominating the neutral or anything... Just grinding out the interactions one by one

corrections.original: 地道にコツコツとした差し合いを一つ一つ買ってって
corrections.corrected: 地道にコツコツとした差し合いを一つ一つ勝ってって
corrections.rule: Kanji homophone: 買って→勝って (winning, not buying)
